Biomet timestamp used to align biomet measurements to carbon-flux rows; final payload uses the shared carbon-flux timestamp.
Biomet site/group identifier used for grouped processing when present; final payload uses the shared site_id.
Biomet incoming shortwave radiation used by eddy processing as Rg and carried to silver/gold under the source name.
Biomet precipitation used by rain filtering as P_RAIN and carried to silver/gold under the source name.
Biomet relative humidity used by eddy processing as rH and carried to silver/gold under the source name; distinct from flux-side RH.
Optional defensive silver-stage humidity fallback when a divergent normalized humidity series appears.
Formatted timestamp mirror for legacy _s2_filt_1 compatibility (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).
